title: MikroTik SFP/SFP+ direct attach Active Optics cable, 5m (S+AO0005)
description: 5m SFP+ 10Gbps Active Optics direct attach cable. This is highly cost-effective way to connect two SFP/SFP+ devices for very short distances, within racks and across adjacent racks. It works with all MikroTik products with SFP/SFP+ ports, including new RB4011 series (RB4011 series are not compatible with passive direct attach cables S+DA0001 and S+DA0003)
specsSearch: Optics Fiber type Multi Mode Core diameter [µm] 50/125 (OM2) Format SFP, SFP+ Transmission speed 1 Gbps, 10 Gbps AOC/DAC cable type Active
